description: Defines an immutable ApiError record for representing error details in API responses, including timestamp, status, error message, detailed message, request path, and field-specific violations.

classes.name: ApiError
classes.description: A record encapsulating API error information, including error timestamp, HTTP status code, error type, message, request path, and optional field violations.

classes.name: ApiError.FieldViolation
classes.description: A nested record representing a validation error on a specific field, including the field name and violation message.
